'''ngathuzu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:grabful|grabful]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-th-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:grabful|grabful]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| ngathuzu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngæthizith|ngæthizith]] || [[word:ngæthizij|ngæthizij]] || [[word:ngæthizish|ngæthizish]] || [[word:ngæthizi|ngæthizi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngathuthuzuth|ngathuthuzuth]] || [[word:ngathuthuzuj|ngathuthuzuj]] || [[word:ngathuthuzush|ngathuthuzush]] || [[word:ngathuthuzu|ngathuthuzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngathuzuth|ngathuzuth]] || [[word:ngathuzuj|ngathuzuj]] || [[word:ngathuzush|ngathuzush]] || [[word:ngathuzu|ngathuzu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngathufzuth|ngathufzuth]] || [[word:ngathufzuj|ngathufzuj]] || [[word:ngathufzush|ngathufzush]] || [[word:ngathufzuf|ngathufzuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ngathuzuthu|ngathuzuthu]] || [[word:ngathuzuju|ngathuzuju]] || [[word:ngathuzushu|ngathuzushu]] || [[word:ngathuzuku|ngathuzuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ngathuzuth|ngathuzuth]] || [[word:ngathuzuj|ngathuzuj]] || [[word:ngathuzush|ngathuzush]] || [[word:ngathuzu|ngathuzu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ngathuzuthul|ngathuzuthul]] || [[word:ngathuzujul|ngathuzujul]] || [[word:ngathuzushul|ngathuzushul]] || [[word:ngathuzukul|ngathuzukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ngathuzuthuthu|ngathuzuthuthu]] || [[word:ngathuzujuju|ngathuzujuju]] || [[word:ngathuzushushu|ngathuzushushu]] || [[word:ngathuzuku|ngathuzuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ngathuzuthun|ngathuzuthun]] || [[word:ngathuzujun|ngathuzujun]] || [[word:ngathuzushun|ngathuzushun]] || [[word:ngathuzukun|ngathuzukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ngathuzuthuoro|ngathuzuthuoro]] || [[word:ngathuzujuoro|ngathuzujuoro]] || [[word:ngathuzushuoro|ngathuzushuoro]] || [[word:ngathuzukuoro|ngathuzukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
